video:video.video:title: Fit60 Workout Tracker iOS App Walkthrough
video:video.video:description: Demo of Fit60 workout companion showcasing SwiftData caches, step counts, active calories, and HealthKit synchronization interfaces.

video:video.video:title: NanhuFX Speech-Recognition Video Teleprompter Demo
video:video.video:description: Walkthrough of NanhuFX voice-synced video teleprompter featuring real-time speech recognition auto-scrolling speeds.

video:video.video:title: QR Maker iOS App Customizer Walkthrough
video:video.video:description: Interactive dashboard demonstration of QR Maker displaying dynamic custom vector color generations and home screen widgets.

video:video.video:title: Runlit GPS tracker iOS & watchOS App Demo
video:video.video:description: Demonstration of Runlit running HUD featuring real-time GPS tracking and ActivityKit lock screen live updates.

video:video.video:title: QR Maker iOS App Customizer Walkthrough
video:video.video:description: Interactive dashboard demonstration of QR Maker displaying dynamic custom vector color generations and home screen widgets.
